steps.title: Compute the intercept
steps.content: $16^{3}=4096$, so the $y$-intercept is $(0,4096)$. That matches choice A — A is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches choice A, $(0, 4096)$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so A is correct.
